notes: This file defines the ω-derivative Dω : K(E) → K(E) via the 1-dimensionality of Kähler differentials, proves all derivation laws, establishes that Dω preserves the coordinate ring (via polynomial induction on the bivariate presentation), and derives the key order inequality ord_P(Dω f) ≥ ord_P(f) − 1. The main outputs are the characteristic-free e ≤ 1 bounds for general isogenies (x- and y-coordinate variants) and the specialisation to [ℓ] (ord_P_mulByInt_y_sub_const_le_one), consumed by MulByIntUnramified and SamePlace. No sorry and no maxHeartbeats overrides; two set_option linter.unusedDecidableInType false appear without comments.
